author: nflaig
content:
this might seem irrelevant even bothering about what the mascot is but I believe this vote has been manipulated and corrupted, so it's my duty to veto the decision, I do prefer 🐻‍❄️ more personally, but that's not why. We shouldn't allow "protocol decisions" based on collusion.

also considering this is expected the be put into clients via ASCII art

cc <@792404665068158998> you pointed this out first, I am not claiming these are bots, I haven't verified that but the data is obvious

if you exclude accounts that were created after the poll opened the vote is 27 🐻‍❄️ vs. 13 🦩 

a few other interesting stats
-  Median account age at poll close: Flamingo ~26 days vs Polar Bear ~413 days (~1.1 yr), by median ~16x difference! 
- Registered in the final ~5 weeks before the poll closed: Flamingo 27/45 (60%) vs Polar Bear 4/39 (10%)
- Registered in 2026 at all: Flamingo 62% vs Polar Bear 21%
- Only 18% of Flamingo voters expose a public profile, vs 56% of Polar Bear voters


so it's pretty clear what the **community** votes for here!
